state_labeling: sorted ascending by rv_21 emission mean: 0 = calmest, K-1 = most turbulent
as_of_alignment: state at t uses an HMM refit on data <= t and the FILTERED posterior P(s_t | y_1..y_t); no future data. Consumers act at >= t+1.
note: States are discovered then labelled by vol; a distinct 'crash' state emerges only if the data supports it — reported, not assumed.
